```{r}
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
fn_vec <- list.files("R", full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.R$")
for (i in seq_along(fn_vec)) {
  source(fn_vec[i])
}
```


```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Define the Parameters for the 8 Scenarios
# ---------------------------------------------------------
scenarios <- list(
  middle = list(mean_neg = 0, sd_neg = sqrt(1.5), mean_pos = 8, sd_pos = sqrt(1.5)),
  extreme = list(mean_neg = sqrt(2), sd_neg = sqrt(2), mean_pos = 8 - sqrt(2), sd_pos = sqrt(2))
)

proportions <- list(
  equal = 0.5,
  unequal = 0.002226562 / 0.1425  # From the simulated weights in the text
)

transforms <- c("normal", "gamma")

# Initialize storage
results_list <- list()
plot_list <- list()

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Execute Loop over All Combinations
# ---------------------------------------------------------
set.seed(42) # For simulation reproducibility

for (tr in transforms) {
  for (scen_name in names(scenarios)) {
    for (prop_name in names(proportions)) {
      
      params <- scenarios[[scen_name]]
      params$prob_pos <- proportions[[prop_name]]
      params$trans <- tr
      
      # Apply coordinate limits to Extreme plots to match user logic
      if (scen_name == "extreme") {
        params$coord_cartesian <- list("y" = c(0, 1))
        params$coord_expand <- list("x" = 0, "y" = 0)
      }
      
      # Run unified function
      res <- do.call(analyze_overlap, params)
      
      # Tag the metrics dataframe with run conditions
      res$metrics$Transform <- tools::toTitleCase(tr)
      res$metrics$Overlap <- tools::toTitleCase(scen_name)
      res$metrics$Proportion <- tools::toTitleCase(prop_name)
      
      results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- res$metrics
      
      # Modify the plot slightly for the grid display (remove huge legends)
      p <- res$plot + 
        ggtitle(paste(tools::toTitleCase(tr), "|", tools::toTitleCase(scen_name), "|", tools::toTitleCase(prop_name))) +
        theme(legend.position = "none", 
              plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
              plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9)) +
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
          plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
        )
      
      plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p
    }
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Compile Final Outputs
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# 1. The Combined Metrics Table
final_metrics_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list) |>
  dplyr::select(Transform, Overlap, Proportion, Metric, Value) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Value = purrr::map_dbl(Value, function(x) signif(x, 3))) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Metric,
    values_from = Value
  )

```


```{r}
#| results: asis
final_metrics_table |> knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
# 2. The Combined Multi-Panel Figure
# (Extract the legend from the last plot to use as a shared legend)
shared_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(
  plot_list[[1]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
)

# Create the 2-column plot grid (4 rows x 2 cols)
plot_grid_main <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 2, align = "vh")

# Combine the main grid with the shared legend at the bottom
final_figure <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_grid_main, shared_legend, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.05)) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

# Save figure
path_p <- projr::projr_path_get("cache", "sim-scenarios", "final_figure.png")
ggsave(
  filename = path_p,
  plot = final_figure,
  width = 18,
  height = 25,
  units = "cm"
)
```

```{r}
#| results: asis
knitr::include_graphics(path_p)
```
